message:
fix(http-shim): spread input object in request() 2-arg callback path

The request() function's 2-argument callback path (where optionsOrCallback
is the callback) had the same mutation-by-reference bug fixed in
_parseOptions: when input is a plain object, returning it directly
allows downstream code to mutate the caller's original options.

Now returns { ...(input || {}) } to create a shallow copy, consistent
with the _parseOptions fix and the 3-argument path which already
merges via spread.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
